an_watch_list.title: Day 2-A Worldly Estate: Capturing The Legacy Of An International Connoisseur
Day 1-A Worldly Estate: Capturing The Legacy Of An International Connoisseur

listings.title: Paradigm Soundscape Soundbar/Sound bar
listings.body: Orig: $1633. One of the best premium sound bars. You will not be disappointed with its room-filling clear sound and strong, deep bass (down to 30 Hz like other high-end sound bars.) Excellent condition. Well-kept in a smoke-free home. I never pushed or abused it. 7 x 50 watts Peak Power / 7 x 25-watts RMS Sustained Comes with wall mount, optical cable, power cord, remote and new/unused wireless subwoofer transmitter. Subwoofer unneeded unless you like the walls and floors to rattle and shake. I am not entertaining low ball offers as I'm in no rush to sell and don't mind keeping it as backup to my Sennheiser Ambeo Max. Bargain hunters can find lots of cheaper alternatives (eg., Sonos, LG, Samsung, Vizio or Bose) with more bells and whistles available using cheap quality materials; weight is a giveaway. Comparable audiophile sound bars such as the Martin Logan Vision, Focal Dimension and Sennheiser Ambeo Max use premium components for superior sound and are built to last for years. Soundscape weighs 20 lbs while my Ambeo weighs 40 lbs. Product details: https://www.paradigm.com/en/soundbars/soundscape Many rave reviews. The main complaint was its high price; you get what you pay for; quality components cost money: https://www.techzab.com/37365/paradigm-soundscape-review https://referencehometheater.com/review/paradigm-soundscape-review/ https://www.soundandvision.com/content/paradigm-soundscape-soundbar https://www.techspot.com/products/audio-video/paradigm-soundscape.104657/ https://www.cnet.com/tech/home-entertainment/game-changer-a-sound-bar-an-audiophile-can-love/ https://www.expertreviews.co.uk/tvs-entertainment/soundbars/1402008/paradigm-soundscape-review https://www.residentialsystems.com/technology/product-review-paradigms-soundscape-powered-soundbar https://hometheaterhifi.com/reviews/speaker/soundbars/paradigm-soundscape-5-1-powered-soundbar-review/ https://www.nytimes.com/2015/04/02/technology/personaltech/reviewing-sound-bars-an-alternative-to-tv-home-theater-systems.html Preference for pickup in Peekskill.  I'll drive and meet curbside in either Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside, Downtown Manhattan (Gramercy Park, East Village, LES, Chinatown,)/Downtown Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC/Queens or along the Sprain/Taconic on Sunday (sometimes Saturday) mornings. I would need to know by Friday afternoon. $25 extra to meet in an outer borough to cover extra time, gas and tolls.  Preference for meeting in Inwood or Chinatown when in NYC. When replying, let me know when, where you can meet along with your contact # to coordinate meetup. Cash and cary/All sales final. Ad will be taken down once sold.

listings.title: Apollo City Pro 22 Electric Scooter
listings.body: Scooter rides very well. stem wobbles a bit and back tire looses air every few days. 2 spare tires are included. Scooter has some scuffing on body please check photos. Charger is included. App is required to unlock full features of the scooter. Comes with a lock to secure scooter. mileage on scooter is 742 miles. Please feel free to message me with any questions.

listings.title: Sanus TV Audio/Video Stand
listings.body: Very good condition/from a smoke-free home. Selling as I've decided to use another tv stand that was gifted to me.  Disassembled for easy transport but note the base is heavy; ~ 50 lbs.  Orig: ~ $325 shipped so my price is more than fair. Product Width:	43.25" / 109.86cm Product Height:	43.75" / 111.13cm Product Depth:	23.25" / 59.06cm If interested, let me know when you would like to pick up, and please include your phone # when responding.  I'm free most days and evenings. Thanks for looking. All sales final. Ad will be deleted once sold. A/V

listings.title: Outlaw Audio RR 2160 Stereo Receiver - Like New
listings.body: Bought because I thought my other receiver's right channel was out but it was actually one of my interconnects that went bad.  It was only used < 3 hours so is in like new condition.  Smoke-free home. Comes in original box and accessories. No low ballers, please.  I'm in no rush to sell. Class A/B design (usually found in more expensive amps) with 110 watts for 8 ohms. 28 lbs. Outlaw Audio sells products directly to consumers so there's not that usual dealer markup.  Company and RR2160 have received high praise for outstanding sound and high quality/audiophile grade components at a moderate price. https://www.stereophile.com/content/outlaw-audio-rr2160-stereo-receiver  "...a conspicuously good-sounding audiophile product at a ridiculously low price. Highly recommended." https://www.soundandvision.com/content/outlaw-rr2160-stereo-receiver-review "...a stupendously great-sounding stereo receiver." https://www.cnet.com/news/outlaw-audio-rr-2160-the-audiophile-choice-for-stereo-receivers/ https://hometheaterhifi.com/reviews/receiver-processor/receivers/outlaw-audio-rr2160-stereo-retro-receiver-review/ I'm only free to meet curbside in NYC (Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside, Downtown Manhattan/Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC) or along the Sprain/Taconic on some Sunday (sometimes Saturday) mornings. I would need to know by Friday afternoon. Meetup in Chinatown/LES preferred when in NYC. If interested, let me know when and where you would like to meet and please include your phone # when responding. Cash (only) and carry. No trades. All sales final.

listings.title: Tripp Lite Home Theater Power/Line Conditioner/Surge Protector
listings.body: Model: HT1210ISOCTR in excellent/like new condition from original owner and smoke-free home.  I bought this directly from Tripp Lite for $449 + shipping/taxes.  Nothing wrong with it and it never had any problems, surges or spikes.  Comes with manual, original unused accessories; rack mounts,  coaxial cable, telephone wire and remote (used a couple of times then put away.) Cash and carry.  No low ballers, please. 5,700 joules surge protection $150,000 lifetime equipment protection http://www.laaudiofile.com/ht1210isoctr.html Please note that I can only meet Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside/Downtown (Gramercy Park, East Village, LES, Chinatown,) Downtown Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC/Queens or along the Sprain/Taconic on Sunday mornings. I would need to know by Saturday afternoon.  Preference for meeting in Inwood or Chinatown when in NYC.  $20 delivery fee to an outer borough to cover extra time, gas and tolls. When replying, let me know when, where you would like to meet along with your phone number to coordinate pickup. Cash and carry/All sales final. Ad will be taken down once sold. Tripp Lite

listings.title: Outlaw Audio BLSV2 Bookshelf Speakers & Arogsy Spire Speaker Stands
listings.body: Both speakers and stands for (will not separate) $800 cash.  My price is more than fair since they are in like-new condition, have very low hours and no longer manufactured.  Bought to use in my living room but sat mostly unused; played on them for  < 3 hours (not a typo or lie.)  Argosy 360i speaker stands have built-in IsoAcoustics speaker-isolation technology.  Speakers come in original box and manual.  Smoke-free home. Designed by former Snell engineers.  Outlaw Audio sells directly so there isn't the normal dealer markup. https://www.audioholics.com/bookshelf-speaker-reviews/outlaw-blsv2 https://argosyconsole.com/spire/spire-i "...it is clear where their manufacturing cost was spent: premium components.  In a highly crowded market of bookshelf speakers at this price point, these are a standout choice.  These are a speaker set where high fidelity was the highest priority as a design goal, and nearly everything in these speakers serve that goal. For those who want a no-nonsense, great-sounding speaker set in this price range, this is an easy recommend." If interested, let me know when you would to pick them up along with your phone # when responding. Cash (only) and carry. No trades/low ballers. All sales final. Post will be taken down once sold.

listings.title: Pangea Power Cable/Cord
listings.body: Selling my Pangea powers cords as I don't listen to music as much.  These are the originals and improves the overall sound. The AC9 cords are actually 7 gauge; thick as a 3/4" garden hose. "You Don’t Always Have to Pay a Lot to Get a Lot" "The AC-9 is a perfect example of the adage that you don’t always have to pay a lot to get a lot, notes Sean Fowler in his April 13, 2010 review of the original-model AC-9 for SonicFlare.com. "As I listen to the AC-9, I struggle to think of a time when I heard any other affordable power cord deliver such a natural presentation without committing some kind of damning caveat." Everything was gently used or new/unused.  I am the original owner and not entertaining low ball offers even for multiple pieces; esp. if I have to drive to an outer borough as it adds significant travel time to my drive home. AC14 2.0 meters - SOLD AC14 C7 (meant for source components such as TV's, soundbars, DVD players...etc.) 3.0 meters - $100 (new in box) AC9 1.5 meters - $125 AC9 2.0 meters - $175 AC9SE 2.0 meters $225 I also have a 1.5 meter and 2.0 meter Pangea 24PC 4% sliver plated HDMI cables that are barely used; $20 or $25 respectively. Please note that I live in northern Westchester so am only free to meet in Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside, Downtown Manhattan/Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene,  Clinton Hill,  North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC or along the Sprain/Taconic on Sunday (sometimes Saturday) mornings. I would need to know by Friday afternoon.  Preference for pickup in Inwood or Chinatown/LES when in NYC. When replying, let me know when, where you can meet along with your contact # to coordinate pickup. Post will be updated once a cable has sold. Cash only/All sales final. Audiophile

listings.title: Metabo Burnishing Kit (Made in Germany) - New in Box
listings.body: Thought I would use this burnisher to polish my stainless steel tables but am too lazy.  Comes with all original accessories and 3 pack  non-woven fleece belt meant to polish table legs.  There is a dent on the side of the metal box.  No low ballers, please.  I'm in no rush to sell. https://www.amazon.com/Metabo-602259620-SE17-200-Burnishing-Machine/dp/B07C3TQ9JV https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B000VE6DCE/ref=ppx_yo_dt_b_search_asin_title?ie=UTF8&psc=1 Please note that I live in northern Westchester and only free to meet up in NYC on Sunday (sometimes Saturday) morning and meet curbside in Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside/Downtown Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC/Queens or along the Sprain/Taconic. Other locations on a case-by-case basis, and with a small fee to cover time and gas.  I would need to know by Friday afternoon.  This is a bit bulky and heavy (~ 45 lbs) so having a car is advised if you're not by one of the meetup locations.  Preference for meeting up in Inwood or Chinatown when in NYC. When replying, let me where and when you would like to meet meet along with your phone number. Cash and carry.  All sales final. Ad will be deleted once sold. Polisher/Burnisher

listings.title: Bissell PowerFresh Deluxe Steam Mop
listings.body: Used Only 3 Times!  The Bissell PowerFresh Deluxe Steam Mop (1806) is a highly rated, 1500-watt corded steam mop (\(6.2\) lbs) designed for sanitizing sealed hard floors, tile, and hardwood, removing 99.9% of germs without harsh chemicals. It features a 30-second heat-up time, a flip-down SpotBoost brush for, and a 19 oz water tank. Key Features & PerformanceSpotBoost Brush: A detachable brush on the back of the mop head helps scrub tough, sticky, or grout-heavy messes.Sanitization: Uses the natural power of steam to sanitize floors, eliminating 99.9% of germs and bacteria.Scented Cleaning: Includes a built-in tray for Spring Breeze scent discs to release a fresh aroma while cleaning.Adjustable Steam: Features digital controls to select between high and low steam settings.Maneuverability: Equipped with a swivel head to clean around furniture and tight spaces. This was a gifted to me and I've only used it 3 times.  Unfortunately, it's forbidden in my complex to use steam mops on my hardwood floors, so my loss - your gain!  Comes with Microfiber soft pad (1)Microfiber scrubby pad (1)Spring Breeze Fragrance Discs (1)Attachable water cup.

listings.title: 1988 Topps baseball cards over 500 per box
listings.body: I have for sale sets of Topps 1988 baseball cards in near mint condition. Many mint and error cards. Make me an offer I know the value so please no low bawling. Scammers I am no shipping to your relatives or take check or money orders. It's cash only.

listings.title: Air hockey table
listings.body: MD Sports air hockey table for sale in Ardsley. 4 feet wide by 7 feet long. Four paddles and one puck included. I've removed the legs for easier transport, but you'll still need a good amount of trunk space (the height of the table alone is 11 inches; the legs add another 22 inches or so). Priced low to compensate for the hassle of transporting it (I would recommend at least 3 fit people to get it in and out of your vehicle. Cash only please.
